title: sida sangana
intro: Sida sangana, also known as the hairy sida, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is a perennial herb that is native to various parts of the world, including Asia and Africa. The medicinal properties of Sida sangana lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Sida sangana is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function.
